overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking through a rural landscape at dusk. The character travels from a campsite through open meadows and into a forested path with wooden fences, featuring atmospheric blue-green lighting and overcast skies.

events.description: leaving camp area and entering open meadow
character descends grassy hill onto dirt path

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking away from the campsite down a grassy slope toward the open field

notable_agents.action: sitting on grassy hill near the camp, watching the surroundings

entered.detail: Brown canvas tent with wooden poles at the campsite
Circular stone ring for campfire near the tent
Grassy hill slope leading down from the camp

segments.scene_description: The segment opens at a campsite with a canvas tent and stone fire pit on a grassy knoll. Geralt walks away from the camp down the slope, passing an NPC sitting on the hill, and transitions onto a dirt path leading into open meadows.

events.description: path enters slightly darker area as clouds cover the dim sky

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily along the winding dirt path through tall grass meadows

entered.detail: Winding dirt trail cutting through tall grass
Scattered pine trees dotting the meadow horizon
Tall green grass covering the open meadow

segments.scene_description: Walking through open meadows along a dirt path, the scene features tall grass and scattered pine trees under an overcast dusk sky. The campsite disappears behind as the path winds toward a distant forest.

events.description: entering dense forest from open meadow, trees close in around path
wooden fences appear along the right side of the path

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking into the darker forested area where the path narrows and wooden fences line the route

entered.detail: Thick overhead canopy of deciduous trees blocking the sky
White-barked birch trees lining the left side of the path
Weathered wooden post fence running alongside the trail

segments.scene_description: The environment transitions from open meadow to dense forest with a thick tree canopy overhead. White birch trees appear on the left while rustic wooden fences emerge along the right side of the narrowing dirt path.

events.description: character stops walking and turns around to face the path behind

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking along the fenced path, then stopping and turning to face back toward the direction he came

entered.detail: Tall yellow sunflowers growing beside the wooden fence
Broken and leaning wooden fence posts on the left side

segments.scene_description: Walking through a narrow fenced section of the forest path with tall sunflowers blooming beside the fence. The trail becomes more enclosed with broken fences on the left, and the character stops to turn around at the end of the segment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a quiet rural campsite into the enclosing depths of a forested trail at dusk. It begins on a grassy knoll beside a canvas tent and stone fire pit, following Geralt as he descends the slope and leaves a seated NPC behind to enter a winding dirt path. As the camera moves forward, the landscape opens into wide meadows filled with tall grass and scattered pine trees under an overcast sky. The scene then shifts as the open fields give way to a dense forest canopy, where white birch trees and rustic wooden fences begin to line the narrowing trail. Finally, the path becomes more enclosed with blooming sunflowers and broken fences before the character comes to a halt and turns around.
